component.name: muzaiten
component.summary: Native music player for local libraries

description.p: muzaiten is a native Linux music player focused on local-library browsing, queue-based playback, album artwork, ratings, and scrobbling. It is inspired by MusicBee and ncmpcpp.

ul.li: Local library scanner with source-directory management and incremental rescans
Album-artist sidebar, album grid, artist track table, and queue sidebar
Keyboard-oriented library and free-roam file explorers
Cached album artwork from folder and embedded images
GStreamer playback with PipeWire/PulseAudio/ALSA sinks and an exclusive bit-perfect mode
User ratings with optional MusicBee-compatible rating-tag writeback
fzf-style library search that matches across scripts (accents, Greek/Cyrillic, Japanese romaji), in-app and via a command-line client
Optional MPD bridge for browsing MPD libraries alongside local sources

description.p: Rolling release built from the latest source. See the repository for changes.
